name: OECD.AI Glossary of Terms on AI
description: OECD.AI Glossary of Terms on AI

links.acquisition_blocker: The metadata-recorded source URL https://oecd.ai/en/dashboards/policy-initiatives/glossary-of-terms-on-ai no longer resolves to a glossary — it now serves an unrelated 'AI in Ukraine' policy initiative page. Browsing the OECD.AI Policy Observatory (oecd.ai/wonk, oecd.ai/ai-principles) and the OECD main site (oecd.org/en/topics/sub-issues/ai-principles) did not surface a current OECD AI glossary. OECD's AI definition lives inside their AI Principles document rather than as a standalone glossary page as of 2026-05-21. Re-investigate via OECD librarians or wait for a re-published glossary.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub from glossary research sweep 2026-05-21. Source extraction not yet attempted. Agent note: URL is oecd.ai (sibling domain to oecd.org). Verify namespace.
